The Sisterhood of the Traveling Pants (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $39,053,061Details
International Box Office $2,507,056
Worldwide Box Office $41,560,117
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,833,340 (25.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.97 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:94.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,583 opening theaters/2,583 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $68,906,413

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 1st, 2005 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: June 24th, 2005 (Wide), released as The Sisterhood Of The Traveling Pants (Australia)
Video Release: October 11th, 2005 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for thematic elements, some sensuality and language.
Franchise: Sisterhood of the Traveling Pants
Plot point: Coming of Age
Subgenre: Coming-of-Age Drama
Target audience: Tween
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
